author: cms-tau-pog
body:
This PR contains a set fixes of the way in which PSets configuring WPs of anti-mu tauID used by tauReco at miniAOD are created from their counterparts for regular tauReco at AOD. The most important change is a replacement of (shallow) copying by deep-copying of the original PSets. 

The fixes solve issues occurring when tauReco-at-mini configuration was pickled (e.g. when used with crab) or being a subject of `customiseEarlyDelete`. No changes expected in terms of performance.

#### PR validation:

Unit test passed successfully. 
Matrix tests were not run as they are irrelevant in this PR because the modified cff is not included to official workflows.
title: Fixes of anti-mu cff for tauReco at miniAOD
